ogTitle: Camberwell vs Cambewarra Village: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Camberwell and Cambewarra Village.
heading: Camberwell vs Cambewarra Village — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Camberwell, New South Wales and Cambewarra Village, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cambewarra Village has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Camberwell (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Camberwell or Cambewarra Village safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Camberwell has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Cambewarra Village scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Camberwell scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Cambewarra Village scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Camberwell or Cambewarra Village?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cambewarra Village has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
